---
title: "MLOP"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 1. WCZYTANIE DANYCH
# ===============================================================

library(dplyr)

M <- readRDS("dominance_matrix.rds")
obj_names <- readRDS("object_names.rds")

N <- nrow(M)

cat("Liczba obiektГіw:",N,"\n")



```



```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 2. FUNKCJA CELU LOP
# ===============================================================

eva_sol <- function(sol){

  value <- 0

  for(i in 1:(N-1)){

    for(j in (i+1):N){

      value <- value + M[ sol[i], sol[j] ]

    }

  }

  return(value)

}
```


```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 3. RUCH INSERT
# ===============================================================

make_move <- function(sol,pos_i,pos_j){

  element <- sol[pos_j]

  sol <- sol[-pos_j]

  if(pos_i == 1){

    sol <- c(element,sol)

  }else{

    sol <- append(sol,element,after=pos_i-1)

  }

  return(sol)

}
```

```{r}

# ===============================================================
# 4. DELTA EVALUATION
# ===============================================================

eva_move <- function(sol,val_sol,pos_i,pos_j){

  diff_val <- 0

  element <- sol[pos_j]

  if(pos_i < pos_j){

    subset_indices <- sol[pos_i:(pos_j-1)]

    term1 <- sum(M[element,subset_indices])
    term2 <- sum(M[subset_indices,element])

    diff_val <- diff_val + (term1 - term2)

  }else{

    subset_indices <- sol[(pos_j+1):pos_i]

    term1 <- sum(M[element,subset_indices])
    term2 <- sum(M[subset_indices,element])

    diff_val <- diff_val - (term1 - term2)

  }

  return(val_sol + diff_val)

}
```


```{r}
# ===============================================================
# LOCAL SEARCH 
# ===============================================================

local_search <- function(sol, val_act, epsilon = 0){

  current_sol <- sol
  current_val <- val_act
  
  flag_global_improvement <- TRUE
  
  
  iter_ls <- 0
  max_iter_ls <- 200
  
  while(flag_global_improvement && iter_ls < max_iter_ls){
    
    flag_global_improvement <- FALSE
    
    best_move_val <- current_val
    best_i <- -1
    best_j <- -1
    
    for(pos_j in 1:N){
      
      for(pos_i in 1:N){
        
        if(pos_i == pos_j) next
        
        cand_val <- eva_move(current_sol, current_val, pos_i, pos_j)
        
        
        if(cand_val > best_move_val - epsilon * current_val){
          
          best_move_val <- cand_val
          best_i <- pos_i
          best_j <- pos_j
          
          flag_global_improvement <- TRUE
        }
      }
    }
    
    if(flag_global_improvement){
      
      current_sol <- make_move(current_sol, best_i, best_j)
      current_val <- best_move_val
      
    }
    
    iter_ls <- iter_ls + 1
  }
  
  return(list(sol = current_sol, val = current_val))
}
```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 6. SHAKE 
# ===============================================================

shake <- function(sol, k) {
  new_sol <- sol
  
  if(k == 1) {
    
    pos_i <- sample(2:(N-1), 1)
    flip <- sample(0:1, 1)
    
    if(flip == 0) {
      pos_j <- pos_i + 1
    } else {
      pos_j <- pos_i - 1
    }
    new_sol <- make_move(new_sol, pos_i, pos_j)
    
  } else {
    
    for(i in 1:(k-1)) {
      pos_i <- sample(1:N, 1)
      pos_j <- sample(1:N, 1)
      if(pos_i != pos_j) {
        new_sol <- make_move(new_sol, pos_i, pos_j)
      }
    }
  }
  
  return(new_sol)
}
```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 7. ODLEGЕЃOЕљД† KENDALLA
# ===============================================================

kendall_tau <- function(arr1,arr2){

  distancia <- 0

  n_local <- length(arr1)

  index_map <- numeric(n_local)

  for(i in 1:n_local){

    index_map[arr2[i]] <- i

  }

  for(i in 1:(n_local-1)){

    for(j in (i+1):n_local){

      if(index_map[arr1[i]] > index_map[arr1[j]]){

        distancia <- distancia + 1

      }

    }

  }

  return(distancia)

}
```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 8. BVNS 
# ===============================================================

BVNS <- function(){

  sol <- sample(1:N)

  val <- eva_sol(sol)

  res <- local_search(sol,val)

  sol <- res$sol
  best_val <- res$val

  kmax <- floor(N/2)

  iter <- 0
  MaxIter <- 2000

  while(iter < MaxIter){

    k <- 1

    while(k <= kmax){

      sol_shaken <- shake(sol,k)

      val_shaken <- eva_sol(sol_shaken)

      ls_res <- local_search(sol_shaken,val_shaken)

      if(ls_res$val > best_val){

        sol <- ls_res$sol
        best_val <- ls_res$val

        k <- 1
        iter <- 0

      }else{

        k <- k + 1
        iter <- iter + 1

      }

    }

  }

  return(list(sol=sol,val=best_val))

}
```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# MLOP (VNS) Z PARAMETRAMI
# ===============================================================

MLOP <- function(best_sol,
                 best_val,
                 m = 15,
                 time_limit = 10,
                 kmax = floor(N/2),
                 threshold = 0){

  S <- lapply(1:m,function(x) best_sol)

  kendall_matrix <- matrix(0,nrow=m,ncol=m+1)

  best_MDP <- 0

  start_time <- Sys.time()

  iter <- 0

  while(as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(),start_time,units="secs")) < time_limit){

    rnd <- sample(1:m,1)

    q <- S[[rnd]]

    k <- 1

    while(k < kmax){

      sol_shaken <- shake(q,k)

      val_shaken <- eva_sol(sol_shaken)

      ls_res <- local_search(sol_shaken,val_shaken,epsilon=threshold)

      if(abs(ls_res$val - best_val) <= threshold * best_val){

        exists <- any(sapply(S,function(x) all(x == ls_res$sol)))

        if(!exists){

          best_gain <- 0
          replace_idx <- -1

          new_dists <- sapply(S,function(x) kendall_tau(ls_res$sol,x))

          for(i in 1:m){

            gain <- sum(new_dists[-i]) - kendall_matrix[i,m+1]

            if(gain > best_gain){

              best_gain <- gain
              replace_idx <- i
            }
          }

          if(replace_idx != -1){

            S[[replace_idx]] <- ls_res$sol

            best_MDP <- best_MDP + best_gain

            for(j in 1:m){

              kendall_matrix[replace_idx,j] <- new_dists[j]

              kendall_matrix[j,replace_idx] <- new_dists[j]
            }

            for(i in 1:m){

              kendall_matrix[i,m+1] <- sum(kendall_matrix[i,1:m])
            }

            k <- 1

            next
          }
        }
      }

      k <- k + 1
      iter <- iter + 1
    }

    if(as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(),start_time,units="secs")) >= time_limit) break
  }

  return(S)
}
```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 10. KONFIGURACJA I URUCHOMIENIE 
# ===============================================================
library(dplyr)


m_rozmiar <- 200
limit_czasowy <- 150
tolerancja <- 0.001  
n_size <- N          
kmax_tuned <- floor(n_size / 2)

cat("Szukanie optimum LOP...\n")
res <- BVNS() 

cat("Optimum:", res$val, "\n")
cat("Uruchamiam MLOP (m =", m_rozmiar, ", kmax =", kmax_tuned, ")... \n")


S_dostrojone <- MLOP(
  best_sol = res$sol,
  best_val = res$val,
  m = m_rozmiar,
  time_limit = limit_czasowy,
  kmax = kmax_tuned,
  threshold = tolerancja
)

cat("MLOP zakoЕ„czony\n")

```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 11. RANKING KOЕѓCOWY
# ===============================================================

ranking <- data.frame(

  Pozycja = 1:N,
  Powiat = obj_names[res$sol]

)

print(ranking)
```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 11. ANALIZA UZYSKANYCH WYNIKГ“W
# ===============================================================

ranking_strings <- sapply(S_dostrojone, paste, collapse = ",")
uniq_idx <- !duplicated(ranking_strings)
S_unique <- S_dostrojone[uniq_idx]

liczba_unikalnych <- length(S_unique)


pos_matrix <- matrix(NA, nrow = n_size, ncol = liczba_unikalnych)

for (j in seq_along(S_unique)) {
  ranking <- S_unique[[j]]
  pozycje <- numeric(n_size)
  pozycje[ranking] <- 1:n_size
  pos_matrix[, j] <- pozycje
}


poz_opt <- numeric(n_size)
poz_opt[res$sol] <- 1:n_size


tabela_pelna <- data.frame(
  Powiat = obj_names,
  Poz_Optymalna = poz_opt,
  Min_Poz = apply(pos_matrix, 1, min),
  Srednia_Pozycja = round(rowMeans(pos_matrix), 2),
  Max_Poz = apply(pos_matrix, 1, max)
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Rozpietosc = Max_Poz - Min_Poz,
    Przedzial = paste0("[", Min_Poz, ", ", Max_Poz, "]")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Poz_Optymalna) 


cat("\n--- RAPORT STABILNOЕљCI RANKINGU ---\n")
print(tabela_pelna, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nLiczba wszystkich prГіbek MLOP:", length(S_dostrojone))
cat("\nLiczba unikalnych rozwiД…zaЕ„:", liczba_unikalnych)
cat("\nЕљrednia rozpiД™toЕ›Д‡ (niepewnoЕ›Д‡):", round(mean(tabela_pelna$Rozpietosc), 2))
```

```{r}
# zapis wynikГіw do dalszych eksperymentГіw
save(res, obj_names, N, M, file = "sesja_lop.RData")
```
